sections.subtitle: Current Form and Recent Performances
sections.text: Levante UD are struggling, sitting 19th in the league with only 18 points and without a win in their last three matches, conceding frequently and failing to keep a clean sheet. Villarreal, in contrast, are in strong form, positioned 3rd with 45 points, although they’ve had mixed results recently with a notable win and some defensive lapses, failing to keep a clean sheet in their last 12 games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters between these teams, results have been split with each side claiming a victory. Villarreal dominated the most recent clash with a strong attacking display, while Levante managed a solid home win in the earlier meeting, showing they can pose a threat.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics and Key Insights
sections.text: Levante UD’s defense has been porous, conceding heavily this season and ranking poorly in goals conceded, while their attack struggles to convert chances. Villarreal, on the other hand, boast a potent offense, ranking high in goals scored, though their defensive record shows vulnerabilities that Levante might exploit.

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: Given Villarreal’s superior league standing and attacking firepower, they enter as clear favorites, aligning with the Sofascore model’s prediction of a 62% chance of an away win. Levante’s home form offers some hope, but their defensive frailties and Villarreal’s recent scoring consistency tilt the balance heavily in favor of the visitors.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half between Levante UD and Villarreal ended in a goalless draw, with neither side managing to break the deadlock. Levante UD held more of the ball and showed greater control in the midfield, while Villarreal had the more dangerous opportunities despite having less possession. Both teams entered the final third frequently, indicating an open game, but finishing was lacking as clear chances were either missed or not converted.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance: Levante UD
halftimeSections.text: Levante UD dominated possession and showed a solid defensive structure with strong performances in aerial duels and overall duels won. Their presence in the final third was notable, though they struggled to create significant scoring opportunities. The team picked up a couple of yellow cards, suggesting some physicality in their approach. Key players like Adrián de la Fuente stood out defensively, while Carlos Espí contributed with a shot on target.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance: Villarreal
halftimeSections.text: Villarreal, despite having less of the ball, posed a greater attacking threat in the first half. They created a couple of big chances but failed to capitalize, missing key opportunities and even hitting the woodwork. Their expected goals were significantly higher than Levante's, reflecting their potential to score. Defensively, they struggled in duels, particularly in the air, but players like Santiago Mouriño showed strength with crucial tackles and clearances.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The game started with Levante UD taking the initiative, showing early attacking intent with sustained pressure in the opening minutes. As the half progressed, Villarreal gradually shifted the momentum in their favor, enjoying spells of dominance particularly in the middle and latter stages of the half. Levante fought back with moments of intensity, pushing forward in bursts, but Villarreal seemed to control the more dangerous phases towards the end of the half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key areas to watch in the second half
halftimeSections.text: Discipline will be crucial for Levante UD as they’ve already picked up bookings, and avoiding further cards or a potential red will be important to maintain their numbers on the pitch. Villarreal needs to focus on converting their chances, as their attacking threat is evident but execution is lacking. Both teams are likely to push for a goal, and substitutions could play a significant role in changing the dynamics of this tight encounter.
